---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for DermaFusion-AI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ai-with-abdullah
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you think it should work. Include pseudocode or references if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Related Papers / References
If this is based on a published method, link the paper here.
